text:
Visit 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Ex — 21.7000, or null/missing 

COMMENT: This field is the ACC Risk score calculated from information during the visit. The higher the score, the 
greater the ASCVD risk. The data file also includes a categorical variable that groups this score into 
either high, medium, or low risk (BASELINE_GROUP). After the baseline assessment, subsequent 
provider assessments of patient risk are in the RISK_SCORE field.
